info.name: Raag App API
info.description:
## Overview

Full REST collection for the Raag App backend (`/api/v1`). Import **Inderjet Local** environment and set **baseUrl** if needed.

---

### Collection variables

| Variable | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `baseUrl` | e.g. `http://localhost:3000` |
| `access_token` | Set automatically after **Login** or **Social Login** |
| `user_id` | Set after **Login** / **Social Login** (test script) — used for **Get Suggestions by User ID** |
| `course_id` | Set after **Create Course** (test script) or paste a MongoDB id |
| `course_video_id` | Set after **Add Course Video** (test script) |
| `enrollment_id` | Set after **Enroll** or **Get My Enrollments** (only when enrollment has `_id`) |
| `drive_file_id` | Set after **Google Drive Upload** |
| `plan_id` | Optional: paste from **Get All Plans** for subscription flows |
| `collaborator_id` | Set from **Get Collaborator by ID** or **Get All Collaborators** (test scripts) |
| `category_id` | Set after **Add Category** or **Get All Categories** (test scripts); used for PUT/DELETE |
| `product_id` | Set after **Add Product** or **Get All Products** (tests); GET/PUT/DELETE by id |
| `course_video_bookmark_id` | Set after **Get my bookmarks** or **Add bookmark** (Course video bookmarks) |

---

### Category CRUD (`/category`)

All routes require **Bearer**. **POST** body: **name** (3–50 chars, required), **description** (optional), **image** (optional URI). **GET** optional **page**, **limit** (defaults 1 and 10). **PUT /:id** accepts any of **name**, **description**, **image**, **isActive**. **DELETE /:id** removes the document.

---

### Auth

- **Bearer** is configured at collection level (`{{access_token}}`).
- Requests marked **noauth** override it (register, login, public GETs).
- **GET /user/all** — any authenticated user (Bearer).

---

### Subscription & suggestion user payload

- **subscription** / **suggestion** documents include **`userId`** (string) and nested **`user`** (public profile: `userName`, `email`, `role`, `roleName`, `genderName`, `deviceTypeName`, …). No top-level duplicate `user` key.

---

### Courses & videos

- **GET /course** — Optional Bearer: adds `isEnrolled` + `myRating` on each course. Response: `courses`, `pagination` (`currentPage`, `pageSize`, `totalPages`, …), `totalVideosOnPage`.
- **courseContent** — Embedded lessons on the Course document.
- **videos** — Stored in **CourseVideo**; list/detail merge them as `videos`. On **POST/PUT /course**, include a **`videos`** array to replace all CourseVideo rows for that course (omit `videos` on PUT to leave them unchanged).
- **courseType:** `1` = paid (needs **price**), `2` = free.

---

### Course video bookmarks (`/course-video-bookmarks`)

- **Learner JWT only** (collaborator → 403).
- **GET /** — My bookmarks: **`bookmarks`**, **`total`**, **`page`**, **`totalPages`** (each row: **`title`**, **`videoUrl`**, **`description`**, **`userId`**).
- **POST /** — **`title`**, **`videoUrl`**, optional **`description`**; **`userId`** from JWT.
- **DELETE /:id** — Remove one bookmark (owner only).

Folder: **Course video bookmarks**. Standalone: **`CourseVideoBookmarks.postman_collection.json`**.

---

### Enrollment & rating

`/enrollment/*` and `/rating/*` require Bearer token.

**GET /enrollment?productIds=…** — Resolves **courses** by `identifierId` from the Course model; merges your enrollment when it exists. Catalog-only rows use `catalogOnly: true`, `isEnrolled: false` (no enrollment `_id`). Omit `productIds` for full list / RevenueCat mode when configured.

request.description: Register new user. Returns success + email for OTP verification.
Login. Saves access_token to collection for use in other requests.
Social login (Google/Apple). Saves access_token automatically.
Get current user profile + **wallet** + subscription + currentPlan + isPremium
**GET /user/wallet** — Bearer required. Returns `{ wallet }` (number) for the logged-in user only.

**GET /user/wallet/transactions** — Bearer required. Returns paginated wallet transaction history for the current user.

Response: `{ transactions[], total, page, totalPages, pageSize }`.

Each transaction: `_id`, `type` (`credit` | `debit`), `amount`, `reason` (`add_money` | `course_enrollment`), `title`, `description`, `referenceId`, `referenceModel`, `balanceBefore`, `balanceAfter`, `createdAt`.

**Credit reasons:** `add_money` — user topped up wallet.
**Debit reasons:** `course_enrollment` — coins deducted when enrolling in a paid course.

**POST /user/wallet/add-money** — Body: `{ "amount": positive number }` (max 1e9). Atomically increments **wallet**. Returns `{ wallet }` (new balance). Also records a **credit** entry in Transaction History (`reason: add_money`).

item.name: Get User by ID (profile + suggestions + enrollments)

request.description: **GET /user/:id** — Bearer required. Returns **user** (public profile via `PUBLIC_USER_SELECT` + `roleName` / `genderName` / `deviceTypeName`). **wallet** is included only when you request **your own** id (same as JWT). **suggestions**: that user’s suggestion titles/descriptions (no full user populate). **enrollments**: active, non-expired enrollments with populated **course** (same rules as “my enrollments”). Paste another user’s Mongo id to view their public profile + lists.

**GET /api/v1/user/all** — Requires Bearer. Returns paginated **users** (public profile fields + `roleName`, `genderName`, `deviceTypeName`), **total**, **page**, **totalPages**. Any authenticated user.
Update profile. Supports userName, fullName, email, age, gender, profileImage, etc.
Change password. Requires oldPassword and newPassword.
Send OTP to email for password reset
Verify OTP. type=1 for email verification, returns tokens
Reset password after OTP verification
Permanently delete user account
Invalidates session (clears jti, device fields). Discard access_token on client.

item.name: Category
item.description: CRUD for **Category** model (`name`, `description`, `image`, `isActive`). Uses collection **Bearer** auth.

request.description: **POST /** — Validation: **name** string 3–50 chars (required); **description** optional; **image** optional valid URI. Saves **category_id** on 201. Duplicate **name** returns error from service.
Minimal create: only **name**. Use a unique name if you already ran **Add Category**.
**GET /** — Paginated list, newest first. Response: **categories**, **total**, **page**, **totalPages**. Test script sets **category_id** from the first row.
**PUT /:id** — **id** must be a valid MongoDB ObjectId. Send any subset of **name**, **description**, **image** (URI), **isActive**. Set **{{category_id}}** via Add or Get All first.
**DELETE /:id** — Removes the category document. Returns deleted snapshot in **category**.

item.name: Product
item.description: **Learner JWT only** for **POST** / **PUT** / **DELETE** (collaborator tokens get 403). **userId** is set on create from the token. Responses include **user** (public profile), string **userId**, **isCreatedByMe**, populated **category**.

exec: pm.test('product has user, userId, isCreatedByMe', function () {

request.description: **POST /** — Bearer must be a **learner user** (`/user/user-login`). Server saves **userId**. Each **`product`** includes **`user`** (public profile), string **`userId`**, **`isCreatedByMe`** (true for creator). Replace **{{category_id}}** via Category → Get All or Add Category.

exec: pm.test('first product has user, userId, isCreatedByMe', function () {

query.description: Optional — Mongo **Category** `_id`; omit or disable to list all categories.

request.description: Each **`products[]`** row: **`user`**, **`userId`**, **`category`**, **`isCreatedByMe`**. Optional query **`categoryId`** (ObjectId) filters to that category; combine with **`search`**. Enable **`categoryId`** in Params after **`{{category_id}}`** is set.

exec: pm.test('product has user, userId, isCreatedByMe', function () {

item.name: Collaborator
item.description:
Fields: **name**, **profile**, **coverProfile**, **phoneNumber**, **email**, **address**, **profession** (or **professionValue** on create — one required), optional **password** (hashed server-side; never returned). Responses mirror **profession** / **professionValue**; **password** is never included.

**POST /collaborator/set-password** — Public. Body: **password** (required, min 6) plus **email** and/or **phoneNumber** to locate the collaborator. Password is bcrypt-hashed and saved. If both **email** and **phoneNumber** are sent, both must match the same document.

**GET /collaborator/get/:id** and **GET /collaborator/get-all** include **sections** (full Section docs for that collaborator, sorted by **order** then **createdAt**) and **sectionCount**.

**PUT /collaborator/update/:id** — also accepts a **sections** array to sync all sections in one call (upsert existing by `_id`, create new, delete omitted). Omit `sections` to leave them untouched. Response always includes `sections` + `sectionCount`.

Related: **Section** APIs under `/section` for individual section CRUD. Auth is commented out in routes (enable in **collaborator.route.js** if needed).

request.description: **POST /collaborator/add** — Send **profession** or **professionValue** (string, required one of). Test script saves **collaborator_id** on 201.

**POST /collaborator/set-password** — Send **password** (required). Include **email** and/or **phoneNumber** (at least one). Email is matched case-insensitively. If both identifiers are sent, they must match the same collaborator row. Password is hashed with bcrypt; response never includes **password**.

**GET /collaborator/get-all** — Each item includes **sections** (array), **sectionCount**, **profession** / **professionValue**. Collaborators sorted by **createdAt** desc. Test script sets **collaborator_id** from first row.
**GET /collaborator/get/:id** — Includes **sections** (full Section documents) and **sectionCount**. **password** is never returned.

**PUT /collaborator/update/:id** — Partial update. All fields are optional.

**Collaborator fields:** `name`, `profile`, `coverProfile`, `phoneNumber`, `email`, `address`, `profession` / `professionValue`, `password`.

**sections** *(optional array)* — Full **sync** of sections for this collaborator:
- Section with a known `_id` → **updated in place**.
- Section without `_id` (or unrecognised `_id`) → **created** (linked to this collaborator).
- Existing sections **not included** in the array → **deleted**.
- Omit `sections` entirely to leave existing sections unchanged.

Each section: `title` (required), `description`, `isActive`, `order`, `content[]`.
Each content item: `title` (required), `url` (required, valid URI), `description`, `thumbnail`, `duration`, `order`.

Response includes `collaborator` fields + **sections** array + **sectionCount**.
**DELETE /collaborator/delete/:id** — Permanently removes the document. Response includes deleted **collaborator** snapshot. Set **{{collaborator_id}}** first (Add / Get All / Get by ID).

item.name: Section
item.description:
Sections reference **Collaborator** via **collaboratorId**. Each section has nested **content** (title, url, description, thumbnail, duration, order).

- **POST /section** — **Upsert**: no **sectionId** → create; with **sectionId** → update (must belong to **collaboratorId**).
- **GET /section/collaborator/:collaboratorId** — all sections for that collaborator.
- **GET /section/:id** — one section (**collaboratorId** populated with safe fields).
- **DELETE /section/:id** — remove section.

request.description: **POST /section** — Create. Saves **section_id** on 201. Requires **{{collaborator_id}}**.
**POST /section** — Update when **sectionId** is set; **collaboratorId** must match the section owner.
**GET /section/collaborator/:collaboratorId**
**GET /section/:id** — Populates **collaboratorId**.
**DELETE /section/:id**

item.name: Suggestion
item.description:
Each suggestion includes **`userId`** (string) and nested **`user`** (public profile: `userName`, `email`, `role`, `roleName`, `genderName`, `deviceTypeName`, …). No separate top-level `user` key.

**GET /suggestion/user/:userId** — Only the **own** user id (must match `{{user_id}}` from JWT).

request.description: Returns **suggestion** with `userId` + `user`.
Returns **suggestions** for the current user (each with `userId` + `user`).
**GET /api/v1/suggestion/user/:userId** — Only your own id (`{{user_id}}` from Login). 403 if path param ≠ token user.
Returns **suggestion** with `userId` + `user`.
Returns **suggestion** with `userId` + `user`.
Success only; **message** + **success** (no `user` payload).
Public. Test script saves first plan `_id` to **{{plan_id}}** from `plans[0]`.
Get single plan by ID (public)
Create new plan (auth required)
Update plan (auth required)
Delete plan (auth required)

item.name: Subscription
item.description: Each **subscription** includes **`userId`** (string) and nested **`user`** (public profile). No top-level `user` key. No password / tokens in `user`.

request.description: Returns **subscription** with `userId` + `user`. Run **Get All Plans** first to fill **{{plan_id}}**.
Returns **subscription** with `userId` + `user`. Replace `:id` with subscription _id. Also: `PUT /subscription/purchase/:id/confirm-payment`.
Returns **subscription** (or null). When present, includes `userId` + `user`.
Returns **subscriptions** (each with `userId` + `user`), **total**, **page**, **totalPages**.
Returns **subscription** with `userId` + `user`.

item.name: Course
item.description:
**courseType:** `1` = paid (require **price**), `2` = free.
**identifierId** — optional external id (filter: `?identifierId=`).
**collaboratorId** — optional MongoDB **Collaborator** `_id` (stored as **collaborators** on the course). Omit or use **`collaborators`** with the same id. Server checks the collaborator exists.
**courseContent** — embedded lessons on the Course document.
**videos** — syncs to **CourseVideo** when this key is present on POST/PUT (full replace). Omit **videos** on PUT to keep existing videos.
**GET /** returns `courses`, `pagination` (includes `pageSize`), `totalVideosOnPage`. Each course may include **`collaborators`** — populated Collaborator (no password), plus **`professionValue`** when `profession` is set. **`courseRatings`** — array of all rating rows for that course (each: `_id`, `course`, `rating` 1–5, `review`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `user` with `_id`, `userName`, `profileImage`), sorted by **`updatedAt`** desc. Existing **`rating.average`** / **`rating.count`** on the course remain the aggregate summary.
**GET /course/admin/all** — same shape as **GET /** but includes **inactive** and **soft-deleted** (`isDeleted: true`) courses; **no** `isActive` / `isDeleted` filter. **No auth middleware** on the server — protect externally if needed.

item.name: Get All Courses (Admin — includes inactive & deleted)

request.description: **GET /course/admin/all** — Same query params as **GET /course**. Returns **all** matching documents (no filter on **isActive** or **isDeleted**). Response shape matches public list: `courses`, `pagination`, `totalVideosOnPage`.

query.description: Matches title, description, category, identifierId, tags

request.description: Public. Optional Bearer → `isEnrolled` + `myRating` per course. Each item includes `courseTypeName`, merged `videos` from CourseVideo.
Same as **Get All Courses** with auth so enrollment and rating flags are populated.
Single course + `videos` array + `courseContent`. Optional Bearer for `isEnrolled` / `myRating`. Saves `_id` to **{{course_id}}** on success.
Same category, excludes current id. Query **limit** (default 5). Optional Bearer.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Intro to Raag",
  "identifierId": "EXT-1001",
  "collaboratorId": "{{collaborator_id}}",
  "description": "Full description (max 2000 chars).",
  "courseType": 2,
  "category": "Classical",
  "level": "beginner",
  "tags": ["raag", "beginner"],
  "thumbnail": null,
  "duration": "10h",
  "benefits": ["Lifetime access"],
  "prerequisites": [],
  "learningOutcomes": ["Understand basics"],
  "courseContent": [
    {
      "title": "Embedded lesson 1",
      "description": "On Course document",
      "videoUrl": "https://example.com/preview.mp4",
      "duration": "12m",
      "order": 0,
      "isPreview": true
    }
  ],
  "videos": [
    {
      "videoUrl": "https://example.com/playback-1.mp4",
      "title": "CourseVideo row 1",
      "description": "Merged as videos[] in GET",
      "order": 0,
      "isActive": true
    },
    {
      "video_url": "https://example.com/playback-2.mp4",
      "title": "Alias video_url",
      "order": 1
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Auth required. Optional **collaboratorId** (Mongo **Collaborator** `_id`, or **collaborators** with same value). **videos** optional — creates CourseVideo rows in same transaction. For **courseType: 1** add **price**. Remove optional keys you do not need. Saves new **course_id** on 201.
Smallest valid body for a free course (no inline videos).
Partial update. **Does not** send `videos` — existing CourseVideo rows stay unchanged.
Sending **videos** replaces **all** CourseVideo documents for this course. Use **videos: []** to remove every video.
Sets **isDeleted** + **isActive: false**. CourseVideo rows remain in DB.
Permanently deletes Course **and** all CourseVideo rows for this course (transaction).

item.name: Course Video
item.description: Granular CRUD for **CourseVideo** documents. Response uses **videoUrl** (normalized from **video_url**). Alternatively manage the full list via **Course → Create/Update** with a **videos** array.

request.description: `GET .../course-video/course/:courseId` — response `{ videos }` (each item has **videoUrl**). Optional Bearer. Test script sets **course_video_id** from the first video when present.
Response: `{ success, message, video }`. Set **{{course_video_id}}** first, or run after **Get Videos by Course** (copy an id from `videos[]`). Test script saves **video._id**.
Bearer required. **courseId** must match an existing course. Saves new **course_video_id** when response includes created doc.
Bearer required. Uses **{{course_video_id}}** (Mongo _id of CourseVideo).
Bearer required. Deletes one CourseVideo document.

item.name: Course video bookmarks
item.description: **Learner JWT only**. **`/api/v1/course-video-bookmarks`** — **GET /** list, **POST /** add (`title`, `videoUrl`, optional `description`; `userId` from token), **DELETE /:id** remove.

request.description: **GET /** — Paginated **`bookmarks`**: each has **`title`**, **`videoUrl`**, **`description`**, **`userId`**, timestamps.
**POST /** — **`title`** and **`videoUrl`** required; **`description`** optional. **`userId`** is set from the Bearer (do not send `userId` in body).
**DELETE /:id** — Removes this user’s bookmark only. Set **`{{course_video_bookmark_id}}`** from **Get my bookmarks** or **Add bookmark**.

Requires Bearer. Body: **courseId** (required). **Free course** (courseType 2): enrolls with no wallet change. **Paid course** (courseType 1): wallet must be **>= course.price**; price is deducted atomically (`wallet -= price`). If balance is insufficient, error: `Insufficient wallet balance for enrollment. Required: X, available: Y.` Optional **transactionId** / **paymentMethod**; defaults to wallet in payment details. Saves **enrollment_id** on 201.

Requires Bearer. Returns **enrollments** from the database (active, non-expired) with **course** populated + videos / watch policy / **myRating**. **productIds** query params are ignored by this endpoint (legacy clients may still send them).
Requires Bearer. Set enrollment_id from list or paste Mongo _id.
Requires Bearer. Uses {{enrollment_id}}.
Requires Bearer. Uses {{enrollment_id}}.
Requires Bearer + active enrollment. Body: rating (1-5), review (optional). POST again updates same row; course rating.average / rating.count recalculated.
Create new previous result
Get all previous results with pagination
Get single previous result by ID
Update previous result
Delete previous result
Upload file (image/video/audio/pdf). Field name: image. Returns url for profileImage.

formdata.description: Required: choose file. For more files, add another form field with the same key "files".
Optional: e.g. uploads/test — created under GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID

request.description: Body must be form-data (not raw JSON). Keys: **files** = File (required). **folder** = Text (optional). Single-file alternative: use key **file** instead of **files**. Optional folder also as query: ?folder=my/subfolder
Set collection variable drive_file_id from upload response data.file.fileId (or files[].fileId).
Uses drive_file_id (set after upload).
